# Open-Jarvis Wiki

> Welcome to the **Open-Jarvis** wiki: this is the community space for notes, deep-dives, knowledge sharing and technical discussion.

## 📚 Official documentation

The **canonical documentation** lives on **GitHub Pages**, not here:

➡️ **<https://fedcal.github.io/open-jarvis/>**

Anything official, versioned and maintained by the core team belongs there. This Wiki is a free space for:

- 🧪 **Community experiments**
- 🛠️ **Practical tutorials** not yet mature for the official docs
- 🐛 Known **workarounds** and tips
- 🌍 **Unofficial translations**
- 💡 **Architectural ideas** in brainstorming phase
- 📝 **Notes on tested hardware** by the community

## 🗺️ Quick index

- 📖 [Official documentation](https://fedcal.github.io/open-jarvis/)
- 📊 [Implementation status](https://fedcal.github.io/open-jarvis/en/status/)

- 🛡️ [Security policy](https://github.com/fedcal/open-jarvis/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
- 💬 [Discussions](https://github.com/fedcal/open-jarvis/discussions)
- 🐞 [Issues](https://github.com/fedcal/open-jarvis/issues)
- 📋 [Project board](https://github.com/users/fedcal/projects)

## ✍️ Contributing to the Wiki

Anyone can create and edit pages. Guidelines:

1. **One page per topic**, descriptive title
2. **Link** to the official docs whenever relevant
3. **Code** always in triple-backtick fences with a language
4. Add **a note** "_last update: YYYY-MM-DD by @user_" at the bottom
5. When content matures, **propose a PR** to move it to the official docs

## 🔒 What NOT to put on the Wiki

- ❌ Tokens, passwords, API keys
- ❌ Other users' personal data (email, phone, address)
- ❌ Third-party copyrighted content without compatible licence
- ❌ Undisclosed security details (see [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/fedcal/open-jarvis/blob/main/SECURITY.md))
